items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ The classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft body bag. The metal knots are crafted using jewelry techniques with micro-cast aluminum🪢, and the decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you flip between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, the shoulder strap is adjustable. The original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".
items.name_cn:
BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ The classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft body bag. The metal knots are crafted using jewelry techniques with micro-cast aluminum🪢, and the decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you flip between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, the shoulder strap is adjustable. The original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".
Style No.: 743568+Wood Hardware
Color: Sulfur Yellow
Dimensions: 25*22*10.5cm

items.name_en: Different colors spark unique brilliance, and different materials create depth and design. BOTTEGA VENETA Large HOP appears in the Retro Denim series. The structured denim pairs with soft leather. Fashion has no standard; innovation is progress. HOP and retro denim, a blend of classic and personal style, casual and lazy yet unique. The extra-large capacity is great for summer, freeing your hands in hot weather.

items.name_en: Genuine leather grain texture, soft and premium—those who touch it will understand. BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Men's Intrecciato Camera Bag features grain leather paired with classic weaving, elevating the texture and durability. The matte finish is perfect for autumn and winter outfits. In terms of capacity, this bag is no less impressive than others, with an interior compartment for easy storage of essentials.

Genuine quality
New classic Loop redesign, oversized ring clasp allows bag to fold or be used as a handle. Crossbody or shoulder strap, detachable to carry as a handbag. Versatile, effortless and composed, lazy yet elegant, creating a subtle sense of luxury.
 Model No. 3003 Dimensions 19X12X9cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Shoulder tote - a lunch bag you can just grab and go. Made with classic intrecciato weaving, embodying Bottega's artisan spirit. The entire body is crafted from top-tier Happa lambskin, very soft, lightweight, and the small shape is cute and exquisite. The interior capacity is also sufficient; it can be carried by hand or under the arm, quite practical! The bottom features a gold metal base to prevent wear. The details are really spot on! The elegant commuter bag for early risers is the one to choose. 3002 Dimensions: 22x13x9.5

specs.rawTitle:
Genuine quality

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival Drawstring Dustbag "Garbage Bag" really easy to match! A lazy, free-spirited vibe 💥 With a classic woven design, creating a timeless fashion staple 🔥 The drawstring closure creates a natural opening with a crumpled look and soft, smooth calfskin. Every detail reveals this bag's lazy yet exquisite feel~🤏 Not only lightweight but also spacious. If you want a bag with a relaxed vibe, get this "garbage bag" that brings you joy ✨ Model 3005
Size: 32x23

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
items.name_cn:
Hello everyone, I have a new name, called Cabat
Weave Mini Basket style~Finally can be worn on the shoulder
It is based on the original bag shape with an added shoulder strap
And it is detachable!
It's like getting the use of two bags for the price of one
As the ace little cutie of the BV family
I really can't help but not own a chain style!
This bag from our shop is truly identical to the authentic one
Spending a little money to make a big impression~
Original Cowhide: Size: 20*16*13cm, Model: 5211#
